login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Quick sign-in with phone number
login.firstLoginHint: First-time sign-in will auto-register your account.
login.sessionReplaced: Your account signed in on another device. Please sign in again.
login.phoneInvalidSimplified: Please enter a valid phone number.
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
login.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to

globalLogin.descriptionOAuth: Use your existing account to continue, sync your desktop device later.
globalLogin.descriptionEmail: New emails will auto-register, sync your desktop device later.
globalLogin.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
globalLogin.googleAuthSubtitle: Google will open to authorize your account.
globalLogin.appleAuthSubtitle: Apple will open to authorize your account.
globalLogin.googleAuthInfo: After Google authorization, ViviDrop will only be used to identify your account and sync devices. It will not read your password.
globalLogin.appleAuthInfo: After Apple ID authorization, ViviDrop will only be used to identify your account and sync devices. It will not read your password.
globalLogin.agreementRequiredBody: Before signing in, you need to confirm that you have read and agreed to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Then you can continue using {{provider}}.
globalLogin.agreementInfoText: explain how accounts, device connections, and sync data are handled.
globalLogin.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
globalLogin.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email, please check your inbox.
globalLogin.loginFailed: Sign in failed. The code may be incorrect or expired.
